parameters.query:
INSERT INTO appointments (
    doctor_id, 
    patient_name, 
    patient_phone, 
    start_time, 
    end_time, 
    status,
    notes -- The new column for "darani darsa"
)
VALUES (
    '{{ $json.doctor_id }}', 
    '{{ $json.patient_name }}', 
    '{{ $json.patient_phone }}', 
    '{{ $json.start_time }}'::timestamptz, 
    ('{{ $json.start_time }}'::timestamptz + interval '30 minutes'), 
    'confirmed',
    '{{ $json.note }}'
);
